item.title: Wish Upon A Star Was The Movie Of My Childhood
item.description: Let's review a beloved 90s Disney Channel cult classic focusing on teenage sisters Alexia (Katherine Heigl) and Hayley (Danielle Harris) who swap bodies after a shooting star wish.

media:content.media:title: Wish Upon A Star Was The Movie Of My Childhood
media:content.media:description: Let's review a beloved 90s Disney Channel cult classic focusing on teenage sisters Alexia (Katherine Heigl) and Hayley (Danielle Harris) who swap bodies after a shooting star wish.

item.title: Has The Movie 'Model Behavior' Stood The Test of Time?
item.description: Two teenagers, identical in appearance, swap lives in this early 2000s movie review. One is a model, the other a high school student. Expect plenty of 90s/00s fashion, questionable hairstyles, and a young Justin Timberlake.

media:content.media:title: Has The Movie 'Model Behavior' Stood The Test of Time?
media:content.media:description: Two teenagers, identical in appearance, swap lives in this early 2000s movie review. One is a model, the other a high school student. Expect plenty of 90s/00s fashion, questionable hairstyles, and a young Justin Timberlake.

item.title: CoffeeTok is Getting Ridiculous
item.description: CoffeeTok is basically just wasteful, excessively sugary, and absurdly large drinks, often referred to as "flavor goo" or "diabetes in a cup".

media:content.media:title: CoffeeTok is Getting Ridiculous
media:content.media:description: CoffeeTok is basically just wasteful, excessively sugary, and absurdly large drinks, often referred to as "flavor goo" or "diabetes in a cup".
